title: Abyssium
description: Making The End worthwhile. That’s Abyssium.
body:
![On the left, there is an Abyssium mod icon. On the right side of it, it reads "Minecraft Fabric 1.21.5-1.21.10" and below it, there is a text that reads "Abyssium". The background of the image is a blue color, fading into a navy blue color from the top to bottom.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01ee3959ee87d21436c544e149b1035d7b611208.png)

![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/abyssium?style=for-the-badge)
![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/nDxAwnzY?style=for-the-badge)
![Requires Fabric API](https://img.shields.io/badge/Requires-Fabric%20API-blue?style=for-the-badge&color=%23DBD0B4)

What if **the End** had a **new ore** that was even **stronger** than **Netherite**? What if you could **upgrade** your **elytra**?

Introducing **Abyssium**, a **brand new** _- faithful to lore -_ Minecraft mod that adds a **new ore** called "**Abyssium**"!

Keep in mind, the **already generated** chunks will not contain **Abyssium Ore**. _Sorry for the inconvenience!_

#

![On the left, there is an Abyssium Chestplate rotated 15 degrees to the left. In the middle and at the top, it reads "Frequently Asked Questions". Below it, it reads "FAQ". On the right, you can see an Abyssium Plated Elytra rotated 15 degrees to the right. The background of the image is a blue color, fading into a navy blue color from the top to bottom.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f4e930dd38c07a5093da04cdc7df47f01b3a7f4.png)

**Is Fabric API required?** | Yes, Fabric API is required to run Abyssium.

**Is this compatible with [X] mod?** | Due to _slightly_ questionable coding, we **cannot** be sure whether **Abyssium** and **[X] mod** is **compatible** or **not**. _Test it out yourself!_
